creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm unsure how to integrate this support into the current KDE 2.2 
framework.  Could you please advise me on how to do this?  You can 
apparently add certificates, but I couldn't figure out how to get 
Konqueror to use the one(s) from this particular port.  I'd like 
to avoid source modifications or the symlink hack you mentioned..
